headline: Barclays Boosts ONEOK (OKE) Price Target While Maintaining Equal Weight Rating
summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) is included among the 14 Low PE High Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 6, Barclays analyst Theresa Chen raised the firm’s price recommendation on ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) to $82 from $76 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares after meeting with management. The analyst said Oneok’s “diversified […]

headline: Is ONEOK (OKE) Pricing Fair After Recent Midstream Sector Sentiment Shift?
summary: If you are wondering whether ONEOK at around US$85.76 is offering good value or asking too much, you are in the right place to size up what the current price might be implying. The stock price moves help frame that question, with a 1.2% return over the last 7 days, 3.2% over 30 days, 15.4% year to date and a 2.6% decline over the past year, alongside longer term returns of 64.8% over 3 years and 126.1% over 5 years. Recent news around ONEOK has focused on its role as a large US midstream...
